title: Rekindled Legacy
description: A faithful re-creation of older Legacy Console Edition versions! (An Official Legacy4J Project)
body: [](https://modrinth.com/modpack/2000s-edition) [](https://modrinth.com/project/rekindled-legacy) [](https://codeberg.org/Nostalgica-Reverie/Legacy-Modpack-Monorepository) [](https://discord.gg/6pRkrYxbGW) [](https://fabricmc.net/) [](https://www.patreon.com/ViolaFlower) ![Information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d03362b26687472c001dac8baa99ca9f17805b29.png) Rekindled Legacy is the spiritual successor to the [Legacy Reborn](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-reborn) modpack, seeking to re-create old versions of Legacy Console Edition on NeoForge 1.21.1. Rekindled Legacy has plans to support re-creations up to TU30, with TU1 and TU3 available now, with TU5, TU7 and TU9 all being in the works for a Q1 2026 release. Check out [NicSonic](https://modrinth.com/user/NicSonic)'s SteamGridDB assets for Rekindled Legacy [here](https://www.steamgriddb.com/collection/23494)! ## BisectHosting [![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ad101ab450c3f90056b4fadc4a64456cca69eaf.webp)](https://bh.naomieow.xyz/raamviot50) If you want a server set-up for the Rekindled Legacy modpack with absolutely 0 effort, [get a server with BisectHosting](https://bh.naomieow.xyz/raamviot50) and use code **raamviot50** for ***25% off your first month!*** ## Nostalgica Reverie discord The Nostalgica Reverie discord is the best place for nostalgia-based projects like Re-Console, Nostalgic Tweaks, Moderner Beta, and more! Here you can discuss anything related to our organizations projects, interact with the community or talk about programming! [Click here to join!](https://discord.gg/6pRkrYxbGW) ![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7999206be881ab8fbb33c79e6c9823f2c47a368.png) ### Legacy Console Edition accuracy Rekindled Legacy seeks to re-create old LCE as accurately as possible. We do this via the Legacy4J mod, datapacks, and resource packs. ### Open Source Rekindled Legacy is comprised of only open-source or source-available mods, which gives you the ability to see the code and contribute to the mods in the pack. Rekindled Legacy is also available on GitHub as a packwiz project. ### Up to Date Rekindled Legacy is maintained by 3 people, which allows it to stay up to date. ![Special Thanks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89b1a2012d6a5a90001621deffafb3f2cb024312.png) - [AzaleaCatgirl99](https://modrinth.com/user/AzaleaCatgirl99) for making Legacy Reborn, of which this project is inspired from - [Cjnator38](modrinth.com/user/Cjnator38) and [NicSonic](https://modrinth.com/user/NicSonic) for making the branding - [S_N00B](https://modrinth.com/user/s_n00b) for making Console-idated, of which this project was inspired from - [WilyIcaro](https://modrinth.com/user/wilyicaro) for making the Legacy4J mod, which this pack wouldn't be possible without ![Not your cup of tea?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bade787b2266fe938dc5bbb39b19255cfa84261.png) [](https://modrinth.com/collection/72AM2FL7)
